ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the journal where the article was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "article_link" TEXT /* Link to the article */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the article */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., draft, submitted, published) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was submitted for review */,
  "acceptance_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accepted for publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations received by the article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the journal */,
  "journal_type" TEXT /* Type of journal (e.g., open-access, subscription-based) */,
  "editor_in_chief" TEXT /* Name of the journal's editor-in-chief */,
  "publisher_email" TEXT /* Email address of the journal's publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the author */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the author */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "article_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-author relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the article */,
  "corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Whether the author is the corresponding author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the article */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the author to the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article-author relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article-author relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_authors_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the research field */,
  "subfield_name" TEXT /* Name of the subfield */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research field or subfield */,
  "field_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the research field */,
  "parent_field_id" INTEGER /* Parent research field ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the research field record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the research field record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_fields" (
  "article_field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-field relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research field */,
  "relevance" REAL /* Relevance of the research field to the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article-field relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article-field relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_fields_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_fields_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES research_fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was completed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the reviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reviewer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reviewer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article version */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., views, downloads, citations) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_metrics_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
